_meta.description: Traxis Manufacturing project index. Knowledge base for the Telegram bot agent.

company.name: Traxis Manufacturing

people.Wolfgang: Owner. Strategy, scheduling, business visibility. Runs all 25 projects.
people.Garrett: CNC Programmer. Fusion 360 CAM, post processors, tool libraries, program transfer.
people.Thomas: CNC Programmer. Same as Garrett -- they share programming duties.
people.Rene: Purchasing & admin. Work order creation, vendor POs, packing slips, COTS inventory.
people.Chris: Quality/inspection. First article, in-process checks, final inspection.

company.machines: 8 mills + 2 lathes. FOCAS-connected: M2, M3, M6, M8, T2. Haas VF-5 via Pi Zero USB.

projects.name: ProShop Automations
projects.short: Fusion 360 add-in connecting to ProShop ERP via GraphQL API for work order browsing.
subprojects: ProShopBridge - Fusion add-in for browsing WOs inside Fusion
ProgrammingTimer - Auto-tracks programming time per part (v1.0, no ProShop push yet)
Overseer - Watchdog on 10.1.1.71 (port 8060) managing FocasMonitor, dashboards
Shop Hub v2.0 - Live CNC utilization dashboard (port 8070) with messaging
ToolRenumber - Fusion add-in for renumbering tools
projects.waiting_on: ProShop OAuth client scope expansion (contacts:r+toolpots:r) for customer tags and machine names
projects.needs_from_user: Request scope addition from Adion Systems ProShop admin; validate spindle load fix on machines under load

contracts: Overseer expects each HTTP service to expose a health URL returning JSON. Validators in VALIDATORS dict must match service names in SERVICES_CONFIG. P25 services use PYTHON_EXE (not PYTHONW_EXE) with -u flag. AGENT_DIR path must match P25 folder location.

projects.name: YCM Post Processor Development
projects.short: Custom Fusion 360 post processor for YCM NTC1600LY CNC lathe.

projects.name: Customer Portal
projects.short: Customer portal for RFQ submission, order tracking, and shop floor photo documentation.
projects.waiting_on: Hardware testing for UploadCam tablets and P-touch printer QR label system
projects.needs_from_user: Test UploadCam photo capture on tablets and validate P-touch printer QR label printing at receiving

projects.name: Inspection Print and ProShop Automation
projects.short: AI-powered balloon dimension extraction from engineering drawings to ProShop ERP.
projects.waiting_on: ITAR compliance decision: whether to implement local-only mode or migrate to Google Assured Workloads
projects.needs_from_user: Decide on ITAR compliance path (Path 1: local-only mode vs Path 2: Google Assured Workloads migration)

projects.name: Hyundai Post Processor Development
projects.short: Research BLE proximity detection system for CNC machine shop worker tracking.
projects.waiting_on: Hardware selection decision and ProShop API time tracking scope resolution (users:w blocked)
projects.needs_from_user: Approve MOKOSmart B2 badges + MKGW3 gateway hardware purchase; contact Adion Systems about users:w scope or authorize Selenium time-clock workaround

projects.name: Chevalier Post Processor Development
projects.short: Fusion 360 post processor for Chevalier EM2040L milling center with Fanuc control.

projects.name: Customer Outreach
projects.short: Reduce customer concentration risk through targeted local customer acquisition.
projects.waiting_on: Wolfgang needs to send the outreach email to Kevin Kaufmann at Saronic.
projects.needs_from_user: Send outreach email to Kevin Kaufmann at Saronic Technologies

projects.name: Catastrophe Planning
projects.short: Strategic risk planning for manufacturing business continuity and customer diversification.
projects.waiting_on: Customer Outreach project establishment and systematic business development approach definition
projects.needs_from_user: Decide on support option (AI-assisted outreach vs. human professional help) and commit to dedicated outreach effort

projects.name: Shop Floor Cameras
projects.short: GoPro photo capture kiosk for ProShop work order documentation.
projects.waiting_on: ProShop GraphQL API credentials and QR code format specification
projects.needs_from_user: Complete ProShop API integration setup and QR label testing with P22 print service

produces: QR labels printed via P22 print service
contracts: P9 sends label PNGs to P22 print_service at http://10.1.1.242:5002/api/print-image — payload format {image_base64
label_name}. Labels are 128px tall (PT-P700 printable area)

projects.name: Conversational ProShop
projects.short: Natural language interface for ProShop ERP work order queries.

projects.name: ProShop Mobile App
projects.short: Native iOS app for querying ProShop ERP from shop floor.
projects.waiting_on: Mac hardware required to build/test iOS app in Xcode; iOS development environment setup
projects.needs_from_user: Acquire Mac computer; install Xcode; decide on iOS deployment method (TestFlight, App Store, or enterprise distribution)

projects.name: FASData Implementation
projects.short: FOCAS connector test and live CNC machine data collection system.
subprojects: FocasMonitor - C# service polling 5 CNCs every 60s (10.1.1.71)
TraxisTransfer - GUI for sending NC programs to machines via FOCAS/SSH
TraxisCapture - Fusion add-in for CAM metadata capture
TraxisProgramManager - Fusion add-in for NC metadata injection, O-number versioning
projects.waiting_on: Completion of IP address inventory table for all 8+ mills and lathes
projects.needs_from_user: Fill in missing IP addresses in machine inventory table; verify FOCAS is enabled (TCP port 8193) on each CNC control

projects.name: Preventive Maintenance
projects.short: Battery backup labels for CNC drives. Minimal scope -- just label files.

projects.name: Workstation Display (IPC)
projects.short: Chrome extension for shop floor operators to view work orders and operations on manufacturing workstations.
projects.waiting_on: Visual verification of blue color scheme restyle on shop floor; potential OAuth fix for mutations (currently broken)
projects.needs_from_user: Test IPC v2 on actual workstation display to verify styling matches ProShop blue accent colors and hover-reveal tabs function correctly

projects.name: ProShop Replacement Research
projects.short: Research and architecture for ProShop ERP replacement system.
projects.waiting_on: Completion of remaining Explorer work (Traxis portal deep-dive, Wolfgang validation, StartProto evaluation, machine connectivity protocols, EDI/cXML standards, constraint solver evaluation)
projects.needs_from_user: Team review and approval of COMPLETE_ARCHITECTURE.md; prioritization of remaining Explorer tasks; decision on which pain points to address in Phase 1

projects.name: Fusion Tool Library Product ID Changer
projects.short: Audits and corrects Product IDs in Fusion 360 tool libraries for ProShop ERP integration.
projects.needs_from_user: Test UX improvements (auto-select Document library, connection status indicators, Close button) in Fusion 360

projects.name: COTS Crib Kiosk
projects.short: Touch-screen kiosk for tool crib COTS inventory checkout via QR scanning.
projects.waiting_on: COTS schema introspection to confirm all inventory fields; CORS handling validation on ProShop API calls
projects.needs_from_user: Test the kiosk on shop floor; verify QR scanner works with HP touchscreen; confirm employee name list accuracy

projects.name: ProShop Message Notifier
projects.short: Chrome extension and desktop overlay alert shop floor workers of new ProShop messages.
projects.waiting_on: Flask API message polling endpoint stability; Windows audio API compatibility across shop floor PCs
projects.needs_from_user: Deploy Flask server to production; install Chrome extension on shop floor worker machines; test audio alerts on target hardware

projects.name: Shop Scheduler
projects.short: Flask web app scheduling daily shop jobs with machine readiness and bottleneck diagnostics.
projects.waiting_on: Live data testing and calibration of priority engine urgency scoring against actual shop conditions
projects.needs_from_user: Test /api/priorities/report endpoint and provide feedback on job ranking accuracy and bottleneck diagnosis

contracts: P19 reads P22's tooling.db read-only at ../22. Tool Assembly Management/tool-kiosk/data/tooling.db — path is set in config.py:35 as KIOSK_DB_PATH and must not change without updating config.py. P19 reads tool_inventory table columns: tool_number

projects.name: Traxis Data
projects.short: Analyzes CNC shop ERP data to identify why business loses money despite full capacity.
projects.waiting_on: FASData integration (Project 12) and QuickBooks/bank/utility data exports from Rene
projects.needs_from_user: Rene must export QuickBooks P&L, bank statements, and utility bills; run anonymize.py on exports; verify Dropbox sync of token_map.json

projects.name: Haas Communication Investigation
projects.short: Raspberry Pi Zero bridge for Haas CNC USB and RS-232 serial communication.
projects.waiting_on: RS-232 serial not receiving responses. Need to swap TX/RX wires and test.
projects.needs_from_user: Try swapping TX/RX wires on the MAX3232 board. 5 min physical task.

projects.name: Tool Assembly Management
projects.short: Touch-screen kiosk for tool assembly management with ProShop inventory sync.
projects.needs_from_user: Delete corrupted Chrome profile at %LOCALAPPDATA%\ToolKioskChromeProfile to fix crash loop

produces: /api/print-image (generic PNG label printing for any project)
contracts: P19 reads tooling.db read-only at ../22. Tool Assembly Management/tool-kiosk/data/tooling.db — path must not change without updating P19 config.py:35. Schema contract: tool_inventory table must have columns tool_number
last_counted_at. P22 print_service runs on port 5002 on 10.1.1.242 — P9 and kiosk app consume it. /api/print-image accepts {image_base64

projects.name: Air Compressor Communication
projects.short: Web GUI for monitoring and controlling EMAX rotary screw air compressor via Modbus TCP.
projects.waiting_on: Remote start/stop capability (controller doesn't support FC01/FC02 coils or discoverable command registers)
projects.needs_from_user: Install PUSR DR302 gateway hardware and wire it to compressor controller M2 terminal block.

projects.name: Digital Help For Rene
projects.short: Automate Rene Maldonado's ProShop administrative workload at Traxis Manufacturing.
projects.waiting_on: BOM completion and ProShop API access clarification for automated document generation
projects.needs_from_user: Decide on automation scope priority; resolve ProShop API pagination limits; complete missing BOM data for parts

projects.name: Agent Exploration (Data Quality Agent)
projects.short: Always-running data quality agent auditing manufacturing ERP and machine monitoring.
projects.waiting_on: Collector PC hostname needed for PRIORITY_MAP in service_wrapper.py
projects.needs_from_user: Get hostname of collector PC at 10.1.1.71 and install service on both machines using install_service.bat

contracts: service_wrapper.py launches Overseer which manages TelegramBot + AgentScheduler. Health endpoints must respond JSON with `"status": "ok"` for Overseer validation. agent_scheduler.py runs check_reminders.py/run_audit.py/scan_projects.py as subprocesses from PROJECT_ROOT.

projects.name: Accounting Ingest
projects.short: Syncs vendor invoices from documents to QuickBooks Online via API.
projects.waiting_on: QBO sandbox testing and production deployment validation
projects.needs_from_user: Approve QBO production credentials and configure live environment access

projects.name: Proshop API Usage
projects.short: Monitors ProShop GraphQL API usage patterns across Traxis projects.

produces: RECON_REPORT.md (reference documentation for API usage patterns and vendor guidance)
consumes: All projects that call ProShop GraphQL API (P1
contracts: None — this is a documentation/analysis project

projects.name: Rollo Printer App
projects.short: Windows system tray app for printing PDFs to Rollo thermal printer.

contracts: Expects a Windows printer with "rollo" (case-insensitive) in its name to be installed

projects.name: Material Label Extension
projects.short: Chrome extension that generates and prints material labels for ProShop work orders.

consumes: Brother PT-P700 print service at http://10.1.1.242:5002
